_comments.purpose: TypeScript configuration specifically for test files and Jest setup
_comments.description: Extends main tsconfig with test-specific settings and type definitions
_comments.extends: Inherits from the main tsconfig.json in the same directory
_comments.outDir: Compiled test files output directory (same as app for consistency)
_comments.module: Uses CommonJS for compatibility with Jest testing framework

types.jest: Jest testing framework type definitions for test utilities and matchers
types.node: Node.js type definitions for test environment globals
types.cssmodule: Type definitions for CSS Module imports in test files
types.image: Type definitions for image imports in test files

_comments.include: Includes all test files, Jest config, and TypeScript declaration files
